stratagem.name: ARMOUR OF CONTEMPT
stratagem.lore: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes, combined with their transhuman physiology, makes them unyielding foes to face.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagem.name: TARGET WEAK POINT
stratagem.lore: Targeting vulnerable joints or seams between armoured plates, Space Marine gunners increase the effectiveness of their weapons.
stratagem.target: One Tank Ace unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagem.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted with this and the Kill Shot Stratagem in the same phase.

stratagem.name: KILL SHOT
stratagem.lore: Space Marines are ruthless in culling weakened foes.
stratagem.target: One Tank Ace unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.
stratagem.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted with this and the Target Weak Point Stratagem in the same phase.

stratagem.name: RAPID GUNNERY
stratagem.lore: Advanced targeting systems and the skill of transhuman gunners ensure that Space Marine tanks keep up a punishing rate of fire, even when extracting themselves from a press of enemies.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagem.name: REACTIVE REPOSITIONING
stratagem.lore: Reacting swiftly to enemy movements, this tank’s crew reposition their vehicle, angling armour or taking up an advantageous firing position.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagem.target: One Tank Ace unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagem.name: MACHINE VENGEANCE
stratagem.lore: Bellicose in the extreme, this vehicle’s machine spirit demands immediate vengeance for the hurts it has incurred.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagem.target: One Tank Ace unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is visible and an eligible target.
